title: HOMESHOPA Multipurpose Non Slip Mat, Cream 150cm X 30cm Anti Slip Rug Gripper Roll Rubber Matting, Non-adhesive Grip Liner, Shelf Drawer Line, Waterproof Floor Mat for Home, Office, Car, Caravans
features: BE INNOVATIVE: Consider different applications for it. Underneath a wooden chopping board for an extra secure hold? lining for your toolbox? as a tablecloth? Drawer or shelf protection for the cutlery tray? To keep your dinner dish from shifting, is it on a tray? as a dashboard mat for a car? As a non-slip underlay under rugs? grip for vinyl, linoleum, tiles, and hard flooring? the serving tray tables' non-slip pads? With our premium, extra-thick non-slip matting roll, the possibilities are unlimited.

HIGH QUALITY: This anti-slip gripper roll is made of high-quality rubberized PVC materials, making it long-lasting and durable. With an open grid design, the shelf drawer liners allow surfaces to breathe while keeping them free of unwanted dirt and accumulating debris. They won't leave behind any residue, are non-adhesive, reversible, tear-resistant, and extremely durable.

STRONG GRIP: Multipurpose non-slip mat is created with excellent, incredibly strong and forceful grip, a non-adhesive design that reduces slippage and bunching in your drawers or cabinet shelves, and keeps organised goods in place. Refuse the glue or gummy adhesive leftovers. Additionally, you may use this mat roll as a rug gripper to keep your carpet or rug flat and in place, keeping them from gathering and slipping during daily activities or kid-friendly activities.

EASY TO USE: The rug underlay mat measures 150cm X 30cm and is simple to use and install. You can easily trim them with household scissors, cut them to the desired size, and then place the carpet on top to achieve good results. To avoid unnecessary trimming, make sure to measure before you go. Also, for the best grip, wipe down the desired area before applying the liner.

MULTIPURPOSE: The rubber matting roll is widely used for daily use, such as a non slip liner for bed mattress, sheets, and sofa cushions to prevent moving, a liner pad for drawers, shelves, and tool boxes, a rug gripper to prevent sliding, and it can be placed under the kettle, serving tray, wooden chopping board, fruit stand, and so on. It can also keep fruits and vegetables fresh for longer thanks to the neatly distributed small holes.
